hero.name: José Manuel
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Building scalable products with impact
hero.pitch: Full-stack engineer specializing in product development, from architecture to deployment. Currently crafting digital experiences at Bunny Studio from South America for the world.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a Software Engineer based in Peru, working remotely for global companies. I specialize in designing and delivering scalable, production-ready systems with a strong focus on observability, cost efficiency, and robust performance.
about.p2: Currently at Bunny Studio (San Francisco), I work across the full stack — from crafting intuitive front-end experiences with Vue.js and React to building resilient back-end services with Node.js, Python, and cloud infrastructure on AWS.
about.p3: I hold a degree in Computer and Systems Engineering from USAT, was recognized as a Pacific Alliance Scholar (2018), and served as Systems Engineering Ambassador. I'm also an Arctic Code Vault Contributor on GitHub.
about.p4: I speak Spanish natively, English professionally, and Portuguese fluently — enabling me to collaborate effectively with diverse, distributed teams worldwide.

projects.title: Impact
projects.subtitle: Numbers that reflect my engineering journey

production.title: Production Systems
production.description: Built and maintained scalable platforms serving thousands of users daily, handling real-time transactions with high availability across multiple markets.

openSource.title: Open Source & Community
openSource.description: Arctic Code Vault Contributor on GitHub. Active in the open-source community with contributions to various projects and tools used by developers worldwide.

global.title: Global Collaboration
global.description: Working remotely from Peru for companies in San Francisco, collaborating across time zones with cross-functional teams spanning design, product, and engineering.

items.description: Building and scaling the creative services platform that connects professionals with global clients. Full-stack development across frontend, backend, and cloud infrastructure.
achievements: Full-stack development with modern web technologies and cloud services
Contributing to product strategy, system architecture, and platform reliability
Collaborating with cross-functional teams spanning design, product, and engineering

items.description: Built core platform features for the AI-powered professional networking and recruitment platform. Worked across the full stack with TypeScript, Vue.js, Scala, and AWS.
achievements: Built application flow, candidate genome, and search pages using TypeScript, Vue.js, and Scala
Achieved 83% enhancement in Core Web Vitals through optimization techniques
Collaborated on AI-driven matching functions using LLMs (GPT, Gemini)
Leveraged AWS services (CloudWatch, S3, EC2, Lambda) for scalable infrastructure
Mentored developers in technical leadership roles

items.description: Contributed to foundational platform features as part of the engineering team during the early growth stage of the company.
achievements: Contributed to the job post system and candidate pipeline features
Built frontend components using Vue.js and TypeScript
Participated in code reviews and agile ceremonies with a distributed team

items.description: Architected and delivered a full-stack agricultural technology solution including mobile and web applications for field data collection and management.
achievements: Architected Android application for offline data collection with georeferencing and biometric ID
Designed scalable APIs and front-end interfaces using TypeScript, React.js, and Python
Utilized AWS services and Docker for cloud deployments
Led product ownership responsibilities from conception to deployment

items.description: Developed critical features for the Kiui platform, a comprehensive business management tool. Worked across multiple technologies including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and React Native.
achievements: Developed critical features for Kiui platform using TypeScript, Node.js, React, and React Native
Engineered APIs with GraphQL, reducing latency by 35%
Implemented AWS CloudWatch for system observability and monitoring
Built responsive web and mobile experiences for business clients

items.company: Universidad Católica Santo Toribio de Mogrovejo
items.description: Supported software development initiatives within the university's technology department. Enhanced the Aula Virtual platform for improved academic experiences.
achievements: Supported software development initiatives for the university
Enhanced Aula Virtual platform improving the academic experience for students
Collaborated with faculty and IT staff on technology solutions

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: What colleagues and leaders say about working with me

items.name: Alexander Torrenegra
items.text: I met Jose Manuel years ago while working at Torre. Jose Manuel is knowledgeable in product, software development, and AI. His work helped Torre become a leader in the recruitment industry. Jose Manuel is also a great human being. He is the type of person that you want to be friends with. He would be a great asset to any company or project.

items.name: Renan Peixoto
items.text: As JoseMa's manager, I was impressed by his effort and willingness to take on more responsibility. He was instrumental in shaping our platform and his work directly improved the experience for our users. He is a strong, product-focused engineer. JoseMa would make a great addition to any team.
